markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on AI visibility strategy and review project status.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI Visibility is a top priority.** A recent drop in LLM referrals (post-ChatGPT growth) requires a clear explanation and a proactive strategy to maintain growth.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [**A new AI visibility strategy will be developed.** It will use the Scrunch platform to track LLM citations and reverse-engineer successful content to improve Deepgram's presence.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [**The first language page (Spanish) is ready for review.** It includes dynamic panels to correctly display feature support, which varies by language.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**The content focus is shifting to Text-to-Speech (TTS).** Q1 2026 will be 100% TTS; keyword research and topic backlog development begin now.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

## Topics

### AI Visibility Strategy

  - [**Problem:** A recent drop in LLM referrals (post-ChatGPT growth) requires a clear explanation for leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [**Goal:** Develop a proactive strategy to monitor and grow AI visibility, which is a key company focus.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [**Tool:** Use the Scrunch platform to track LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
        1.  [Track persona-based prompts (e.g., "speech to text," "Deepgram vs. OpenAI").](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
        2.  [Identify which sources are cited for those prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
        3.  [Reverse-engineer successful content to improve Deepgram's citation rate.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Content Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
          - [Restructure existing content into LLM-friendly formats (e.g., comparison tables, FAQs).](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
          - [Create new bottom-of-funnel content for decision-making queries.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### Project Updates

  - [**Language Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [The first page (Spanish) is ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**Key Detail:** The page uses dynamic panels to display features, as support varies by language. A spreadsheet provides the logic for this.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [**Content Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [5 articles are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [\~20 articles (including TTS topics) are approved for Will to begin.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:**](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
      - [Will is updating the dashboard by EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
      - [The team is manually removing "AI apps" URLs to fix slow load times caused by filtering.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hasan:** Send the staged Spanish language page and copy doc to Erik for review.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**Hasan & Erik:** Conduct async keyword research for Text-to-Speech (TTS) content.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [**Erik:** Develop a cohesive AI visibility strategy and invite a GrowthX AEO director to the next sync.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**Will:** Complete the Looker dashboard update by EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/A_yZwPu1CidsKxSVvLdJ_AZkGfPf-_YL?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
